column1: # Stationary Livox rosette capture for the synthetic-scan E2E: a tripod scan is
# a trajectory of TWO IDENTICAL poses (same position + attitude) separated in time
# by the acquisition duration. The scanner sits 3 m out along -y looking toward +y
# (identity attitude → the Risley optical axis +y points at a plant near the
# origin). PRF x 0.5 s sets the pulse budget.
# t x y z qx qy qz qw  (Hamilton body->world)
